name: functional-hero-shop
description: Validate the assembled Hero Fist Shop UI, server-authoritative glove purchases, equipping, and timed boosts.

args.code: local H=game:GetService('HttpService') local gui=game.Players.LocalPlayer.PlayerGui:WaitForChild('PunchWallHUD') gui:SetAttribute('AutomationTab','Fists') task.wait(.25) local shop=gui.GameMenu:FindFirstChild('FunctionalHeroShop') local names={'Starter GloveAction','Boxing GloveAction','Iron KnuckleAction','Thunder FistAction','Titan GauntletAction','FistsShopTab','BoostsShopTab','CloseShop'} local found={} for _,name in ipairs(names) do found[name]=shop and shop:FindFirstChild(name,true)~=nil end return H:JSONEncode({visible=shop and shop.Visible,found=found})

steps.label: functional shop renders all glove actions

args.code: local H=game:GetService('HttpService') local c=game.ServerStorage:WaitForChild('PunchWallAutomation') c:Invoke('Reset') c:Invoke('SetStats',{Coins=200000,Power=10,WallLevel=1,CritChance=0,FistMultiplier=1,PetMultiplier=0}) local fist=c:Invoke('BuyFist','Iron Knuckle') local boost=c:Invoke('BuyShopBoost','DamageBoost') local hit=c:Invoke('HitDepthBlock',{layer=1,column=6,row=2}) local p=game.Players:GetPlayers()[1] return H:JSONEncode({fist=fist.ok,boost=boost.ok,equipped=p.RPGStats.EquippedFist.Value,mult=p.RPGStats.FistMultiplier.Value,coins=p.leaderstats.Coins.Value,damageEnds=p:GetAttribute('DamageBoostExpiresAt'),damage=hit.damage,broken=hit.BrokenDepthBlocks})

steps.label: glove and damage boost are charged and applied by server

args.code: local H=game:GetService('HttpService') local c=game.ServerStorage.PunchWallAutomation c:Invoke('Reset') c:Invoke('SetStats',{Coins=50000,Power=10,WallLevel=1,CritChance=0,FistMultiplier=1,PetMultiplier=0}) local coin=c:Invoke('BuyShopBoost','CoinBoost') local p=game.Players:GetPlayers()[1] local before=p.leaderstats.Coins.Value c:Invoke('HitDepthBlock',{layer=1,column=6,row=2}) local reward=p.leaderstats.Coins.Value-before c:Invoke('BuyShopBoost','SpeedBoost') p:LoadCharacter() task.wait(1) local h=p.Character and p.Character:FindFirstChildOfClass('Humanoid') return H:JSONEncode({coin=coin.ok,reward=reward,speed=h and h.WalkSpeed,coinEnds=p:GetAttribute('CoinBoostExpiresAt'),speedEnds=p:GetAttribute('SpeedBoostExpiresAt')})

steps.label: coin boost doubles block reward and speed survives respawn
